heading: Wednesday Night
text: Partly cloudy north, mostly cloudy south, with the slight chance of an evening shower. Lows from the upper 30s to mid 40s, with some upper 40s far south. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph early.

heading: Thursday
text: Partly to mostly sunny. Highs from the mid 50s to lower 60s, with some mid 60s in southern valleys, and some lower 50s far north. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Clear to partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40, with some lower 30s northeast and in the Adirondacks. Winds becoming light and variable.
